steps: File Form 5001 with French tax authorities to reclaim EUR 3,744 excess withholding tax on TotalEnergies dividend
Submit documentation showing Norway-France treaty entitles 15% rate vs. 13.5% applied by BNP Paribas
Request BNP Paribas reverse the overpayment directly or provide supporting docs for Form 5001 filing

references.title: impots.gouv.fr – Form 5001 (Reimbursement of WHT on Dividends)
